mdRecord.dcterms:title: Open Auditions Oct 10 - Oct 11
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Poster for Open Auditions for Arthur Kopit's Oh Dad, Poor Dad, Mamma's Hung You in the Closet and I'm Feelin' So Sad and Paul Zindel's The Effect of Gamma Rays on Man - In - The - Moon Marigolds.
mdRecord.dcterms:contributor: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. Theatre Arts - University Theatre
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Auditions
Virginia
